71e05062-365b-4c27-b276-f80ebaf7ec01.text:
The health system in the besieged Gaza Strip is on the brink of collapse. Doctors are struggling to manage the thousands of patients injured by the brutal Israeli airstrikes

The Israeli Occupation has targeted the Anglican (Al-Ahli) Hospital yesterday, killing hundreds of Palestinians. Journalists on the scene described ““It was rare to find a full body with all its parts. The deeper we went into the hospital, the more shocking and terrifying the scene was.”

This was a doctor’s agonizing reaction to the desperation inside Gaza hospital. The Israeli Occupation has also bombarded multiple hospitals, schools, and ambulances since Oct 7.

0c823ba0-f4bd-4335-9424-e91f1775b889.text:
Israel evicts disabled Palestinian child and demolishes his home

A severely disabled Palestinian boy has been left homeless after Israeli occupation forces destroyed homes in Jerusalem belonging to the Tutah, Burqan and Tawil families. The demolition took place less than a month after a shelter for disabled people was bombed in Gaza, leaving many of its residents sleeping on the rubble of their former home.

#news #OccupiedPalestine

e26cae20-f0a3-4ce1-9fcf-9abf4a3748ee.text:
Mrs. Meyers WHO!?✨🍋

i’m learning that citrus peels, vinegar, and baking soda are kinda the queens of sustainable cleaning 👑 so before you think of tossing (or composting) those lemon peels, let’s extract every last drop of goodness from them! and instead of using those harsh chemicals that come in annoying plastic bottles, say hello to this natural, low-waste lemon vinegar cleaning solution! ✨

here’s the recipe:

1. Fill a glass jar with citrus peels (lemons, oranges, or limes work great! 🍊)
2. Pour white vinegar over the peels until they are fully submerged.
3. Seal the jar and let it sit for 1-2 weeks, allowing the citrus goodness to infuse into the vinegar.
4. After the wait, strain the liquid into a spray bottle (you can compost the peels now!) 
5. Mix the lemon-infused vinegar with equal parts water, and voilà! ✨ 

Give it a try and let me know if it works wonders in your home! now please excuse me while I start Renaissance from the top and clean my whole house 🎶 

B🍋🍋M BABY! 

#diy #cleaning #sustainability #lowwaste #foodwaste

887b36d5-4e6f-4d1e-9baa-4fab96003e11.text: As a Palestinian-American woman, my heart aches deeply for the suffering of my people. As you may know, my father is Palestinian. His mother was forcefully removed from her home in Palestine 75 years ago and was never able to return. Since then, the Palestinians have lived under a military occupation in a constant state of oppression and fear for their lives. I pray I see the day where Palestine is free, and until then it is my duty to educate the world of our history. This is not a war, it is a genocide. May God be with the people of Palestine 🇵🇸🤲🏻💔 #freepalestine

0e66723c-f4ec-4422-8f46-ef2d7501a2f0.text:
Israel Palestine Conflict: Amid escalating tensions, the Israeli military is making preparations for a potential ground incursion into Gaza, although the final decision has not yet been made by political leadership. Israel has also warned that anyone approaching the Gaza fence will be met with force. Military operations have been targeting Hamas' elite 'Nukhba force,' which is believed to have led the recent incursion. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has vowed to "crush and destroy" all Hamas members, and he has formed an emergency unity government and a war Cabinet to oversee the conflict, ensuring that all actions are connected to the ongoing war in response to the weekend assault by Hamas.

bccd1e25-4445-46bf-bdb9-3c939798d2ea.text:
Ibn ‘Abbas (May Allah be pleased with them) said: When (Prophet) Ibraheem(عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّم) was thrown into the fire, he said: 
‎حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
“Allah (Alone) is sufficient for us, and, He is the Best Disposer of affairs.” 
So did Messenger of Allah, Muhammad (ﷺ), when he was told: “A great army of the pagans had gathered against him, so fear them”. But this (warning) only increased him and the Muslims in Faith and they said: “Allah (Alone) is sufficient for us, and He is the Best Disposer of affairs (for us)” 
[Al-Bukhari]

As seen in the meaning itself, it says Allah is sufficient for us. What else do we need, when we have Allah (SWT) on our side? This is indeed a very strong Dua to overcome whatever problems you face. For a Muslim who feels helpless, who are facing marriage issue, fluctuations in his/her career, fear of the enemy, or when the person gets stuck in a situation where no one else can help but Allah.

It doesn’t matter who is against you. You just need to put your trust in Allah (swt), then surely the help will come.
.
.
.
.
.
#hasbunallahwanikmalwakil #duaas #tawakkul #shukr #sabr #حسبي_الله_ونعم_الوكيل #دعاء #توكل #الله #الحمدلله #صبر #islam #jannah #sunnah #prophetmuhammadﷺ #alhamdulillah #islamic

Israel Vs Hamas Day 15 LIVE | Gaza Under Attack | Israel vs Palestine Live | Israel News Live 

The Gaza Health Ministry said an Israeli airstrike on October 17 hit a Gaza City hospital packed with wounded and other Palestinians seeking shelter, killing hundreds. If confirmed, the attack would be by far the deadliest Israeli airstrike in five wars fought since 2008.

Photos from al-Ahli Hospital showed fire engulfing the hospital halls, shattered glass and body parts scattered across the area. The ministry said at least 500 people had been killed.
